urgent_methodology: Publisher-marked Breaking, Urgent, Alert, Just in, Developing or similar items are collected first and receive priority over standard items, unless they are liveblogs, programme previews or low-value content.

latest.title: Argentina face action over Falklands banner
latest.summary: Argentina is facing potential disciplinary action from Fifa after players celebrated their World Cup semi-final win against England with a politically charged banner. The banner read "Las Malvinas son Argentinas", which translates to "The Falklands are Argentine".
latest.details: Argentina is facing potential disciplinary action from Fifa after players celebrated their World Cup semi-final win against England with a politically charged banner. The banner read "Las Malvinas son Argentinas", which translates to "The Falklands are Argentine". The Falkland Islands are a British overseas territory that is the subject of a sovereignty dispute between the UK and Argentina. In 2014, Fifa fined the Argentine Football Association for a similar incident during a friendly match.
latest.full_brief: Argentina is facing potential disciplinary action from Fifa after players celebrated their World Cup semi-final win against England with a politically charged banner. The banner read "Las Malvinas son Argentinas", which translates to "The Falklands are Argentine". The Falkland Islands are a British overseas territory that is the subject of a sovereignty dispute between the UK and Argentina. In 2014, Fifa fined the Argentine Football Association for a similar incident during a friendly match.

latest.title: Special police team to investigate killing of an anti-migrant leader in South Africa
latest.summary: A special police team has begun investigating the killing of Andile Mvuyelwa Somgxada, the Gauteng province leader of March and March. He was shot outside his home east of Johannesburg and died several days later in the hospital.
latest.details: A special police team has begun investigating the killing of Andile Mvuyelwa Somgxada, the Gauteng province leader of March and March. He was shot outside his home east of Johannesburg and died several days later in the hospital. The police confirmed that this incident is being treated seriously, with a multidisciplinary team assigned to the case. March and March has been organizing anti-migrant demonstrations across South Africa, and other leaders have received warnings or death threats.
latest.full_brief: A special police team has begun investigating the killing of Andile Mvuyelwa Somgxada, the Gauteng province leader of March and March. He was shot outside his home east of Johannesburg and died several days later in the hospital. The police confirmed that this incident is being treated seriously, with a multidisciplinary team assigned to the case. March and March has been organizing anti-migrant demonstrations across South Africa, and other leaders have received warnings or death threats.

latest.title: 'I must get out into the free world', dissident who fled China on boat tells BBC
latest.summary: Dong Guangping, a 68-year-old Chinese dissident, fled China by sea after enduring two days without sleep. He was rescued by the coast guard and fishermen in Korean waters after a 40-hour journey.
latest.details: Dong Guangping, a 68-year-old Chinese dissident, fled China by sea after enduring two days without sleep. He was rescued by the coast guard and fishermen in Korean waters after a 40-hour journey. Dong has been jailed multiple times in China for his activism, including for signing a petition related to the Tiananmen crackdown. After being briefly detained in South Korea, he has resettled in Canada, where he expressed that he could never survive in China.
latest.full_brief: Dong Guangping, a 68-year-old Chinese dissident, fled China by sea after enduring two days without sleep. He was rescued by the coast guard and fishermen in Korean waters after a 40-hour journey. Dong has been jailed multiple times in China for his activism, including for signing a petition related to the Tiananmen crackdown. After being briefly detained in South Korea, he has resettled in Canada, where he expressed that he could never survive in China.

latest.title: Actor Sam Neill died from pneumonia, agent confirms
latest.summary: Sam Neill, the New Zealand actor known for his roles in Jurassic Park and Peaky Blinders, died from pneumonia at the age of 78. His family described his death as "sudden and unexpected" and confirmed he had been in remission from non-Hodgkin's lymphoma.
latest.details: Sam Neill, the New Zealand actor known for his roles in Jurassic Park and Peaky Blinders, died from pneumonia at the age of 78. His family described his death as "sudden and unexpected" and confirmed he had been in remission from non-Hodgkin's lymphoma. Neill's agent clarified that he had been actively working on multiple projects prior to his illness. Tributes from fellow actors and public figures highlighted his impact on the film industry and his legacy.
latest.full_brief: Sam Neill, the New Zealand actor known for his roles in Jurassic Park and Peaky Blinders, died from pneumonia at the age of 78. His family described his death as "sudden and unexpected" and confirmed he had been in remission from non-Hodgkin's lymphoma. Neill's agent clarified that he had been actively working on multiple projects prior to his illness. Tributes from fellow actors and public figures highlighted his impact on the film industry and his legacy.

latest.title: Five arrested after Hong Kong police raid independent bookshops
latest.summary: Five people were arrested in Hong Kong for selling books deemed 'seditious' by authorities. Police raided two independent bookshops, seizing publications that allegedly incited hatred against the government, judiciary, and law enforcement.
latest.details: Five people were arrested in Hong Kong for selling books deemed 'seditious' by authorities. Police raided two independent bookshops, seizing publications that allegedly incited hatred against the government, judiciary, and law enforcement. The arrested individuals, aged between 30 and 59, are accused of violating national security laws and could face up to seven years in prison. Amnesty International criticized the raids, stating they reflect a climate of fear and self-censorship in Hong Kong.
latest.full_brief: Five people were arrested in Hong Kong for selling books deemed 'seditious' by authorities. Police raided two independent bookshops, seizing publications that allegedly incited hatred against the government, judiciary, and law enforcement. The arrested individuals, aged between 30 and 59, are accused of violating national security laws and could face up to seven years in prison. Amnesty International criticized the raids, stating they reflect a climate of fear and self-censorship in Hong Kong.

latest.title: Moment US Navy jet stuns packed Florida beach with low flypast
latest.summary: A US Navy Blue Angels jet performed a low flypast over Pensacola Beach, Florida, during an air show, startling beachgoers. The incident caused beach umbrellas and other items to be blown away, but no injuries were reported.
latest.details: A US Navy Blue Angels jet performed a low flypast over Pensacola Beach, Florida, during an air show, startling beachgoers. The incident caused beach umbrellas and other items to be blown away, but no injuries were reported. Officials from the Blue Angels are reviewing the situation after the aircraft flew lower than standard profiles. One beachgoer described the experience as "amazing" despite the disturbance.
latest.full_brief: A US Navy Blue Angels jet performed a low flypast over Pensacola Beach, Florida, during an air show, startling beachgoers. The incident caused beach umbrellas and other items to be blown away, but no injuries were reported. Officials from the Blue Angels are reviewing the situation after the aircraft flew lower than standard profiles. One beachgoer described the experience as "amazing" despite the disturbance.

latest.title: Orange haze from Canada wildfires seen in Ontario and northern US
latest.summary: Smoke and orange haze from active wildfires in Canada have spread across Ontario and into northern US states. Currently, there are 838 wildfires burning across Canada, according to the Canadian Interagency Forest Fire Centre.
latest.details: Smoke and orange haze from active wildfires in Canada have spread across Ontario and into northern US states. Currently, there are 838 wildfires burning across Canada, according to the Canadian Interagency Forest Fire Centre. Officials have indicated that the smoke this year will not be as severe as it was in 2023. The situation is being monitored closely as the wildfires continue to impact air quality.
latest.full_brief: Smoke and orange haze from active wildfires in Canada have spread across Ontario and into northern US states. Currently, there are 838 wildfires burning across Canada, according to the Canadian Interagency Forest Fire Centre. Officials have indicated that the smoke this year will not be as severe as it was in 2023. The situation is being monitored closely as the wildfires continue to impact air quality.

latest.title: French MPs approve assisted dying law with strict rules after years of argument
latest.summary: France's National Assembly has voted to create a right to assisted dying under strict conditions, following extensive debate. The bill allows assisted dying for adults with serious and incurable illnesses who are in unbearable suffering.
latest.details: France's National Assembly has voted to create a right to assisted dying under strict conditions, following extensive debate. The bill allows assisted dying for adults with serious and incurable illnesses who are in unbearable suffering. Prime Minister Sébastien Lecornu plans to refer parts of the bill to the Constitutional Council for examination. The legislation reflects a growing public support for assisted dying in France, despite opposition from the Catholic Church.
latest.full_brief: France's National Assembly has voted to create a right to assisted dying under strict conditions, following extensive debate. The bill allows assisted dying for adults with serious and incurable illnesses who are in unbearable suffering. Prime Minister Sébastien Lecornu plans to refer parts of the bill to the Constitutional Council for examination. The legislation reflects a growing public support for assisted dying in France, despite opposition from the Catholic Church.

latest.title: British Steel taken into public ownership to protect 'vital' UK supply
latest.summary: The UK government has taken British Steel into public ownership to secure the future of the Scunthorpe steelworks. This facility employs around 2,700 people and supports various industries in north Lincolnshire.
latest.details: The UK government has taken British Steel into public ownership to secure the future of the Scunthorpe steelworks. This facility employs around 2,700 people and supports various industries in north Lincolnshire. The nationalisation follows a report indicating that the steelworks was costing the government approximately £1.3 million a day. Business Secretary Peter Kyle emphasized the importance of maintaining primary steel production in the UK to avoid dependency on global supply.
latest.full_brief: The UK government has taken British Steel into public ownership to secure the future of the Scunthorpe steelworks. This facility employs around 2,700 people and supports various industries in north Lincolnshire. The nationalisation follows a report indicating that the steelworks was costing the government approximately £1.3 million a day. Business Secretary Peter Kyle emphasized the importance of maintaining primary steel production in the UK to avoid dependency on global supply.

brief_methodology.pl: Komentarz powstaje wyłącznie z przeczytanego tekstu artykułu. Musi przejść niezależny przegląd AI oraz pełną kontrolę językową; surowy tekst artykułu lub RSS nie może być komentarzem awaryjnym.
brief_methodology.en: A comment is created only from the retrieved article text. It must pass an independent AI review and the complete language gate; raw article or RSS text is never a fallback comment.

comment_quality_gate.pl: Publikowany jest wyłącznie komentarz utworzony z tekstu artykułu, zatwierdzony w niezależnym przeglądzie AI i przyjęty w całości przez rygorystyczną kontrolę językową. Jedno wadliwe zdanie odrzuca cały komentarz.
comment_quality_gate.en: Only an article-derived comment approved by an independent AI review and accepted in full by the strict language gate is published. One defective sentence rejects the whole comment.

same_story_dedupe.rule: One underlying event gets one homepage card, even if multiple publishers cover it with different links.
